products.title: ListingRewriter
products.tagline: Multilingual Listing Optimizer for Hotels & B&Bs
products.description: Scrape independent hotels and B&Bs with weak Booking and Airbnb listings — single-language copy, thin descriptions, low review scores. AI rewrites the listing in 8–12 languages, fixes the title and amenities for search, and flags photo issues with reorder hints. Cold email contains the rewritten listing side-by-side. One extra booking pays for a year of the service.
products.subject_line: Your Booking listing — rewritten, in 8 languages.
wins: One extra booking pays the year
Pan-European TAM, untouched on the team
before_bullets: Photos washed out + out of order
after_bullets: Side-by-side preview in the cold email
products.why_works: Independents underbook because their listing speaks one language to a multilingual market. We translate the whole funnel.

products.title: ProfileScore
products.tagline: Audit-Score GBP Fix for Local Businesses
products.description: Reuse the existing Google Maps pipeline. Score every business's Google Business Profile on a 0–100 scale. For low scorers, AI generates the full fix — optimized description, 10 ready-to-publish GBP posts, drafted Q&A answers, correct category, and photo prompts. Cold email leads with the score; the fix is already attached.
flow: Generate Full Fix — Posts + Q&A + Photos
Cold Email With Score + Fix Preview
wins: Fastest to build (3 days from existing stack)
Cleanest extension of what we already have
Immediate visible value in the cold email
products.why_works: A 0–100 score is undeniable in an inbox. Pair it with the fix already drafted and the buyer just clicks publish.

products.title: SiteSwap
products.tagline: Side-by-Side Modern Redesign for Outdated Business Sites
products.description: Biggest TAM of the three. Scrape Google Maps for businesses that already have a website but it's old, slow, or non-mobile. AI generates a modern responsive replacement using their existing content. Cold email contains a side-by-side screenshot — their site today vs. the version we already built for them. Reuses the entire current stack — flips the filter from no-website to ugly-website.
flow: Scrape Old Sites via Google Maps
products.subject_line: Your website vs. the version we already built for you.
wins: Flips filter from no-website to ugly-website
before_bullets: Broken contact form or no CTA
products.why_works: A side-by-side image of their site beside the modern one we already built makes the decision visual, not abstract.
